entries.summary: Added case-insensitive required heading checks and Scope (In / Out) label validation to the spec validator, with reports now written as .validation.md files. Generated a missing-heading report; the staging validation command failed because the staging spec file is absent.

fields.Summary: Added case-insensitive required heading checks and Scope (In / Out) label validation to the spec validator, with reports now written as .validation.md files. Generated a missing-heading report; the staging validation command failed because the staging spec file is absent.

fields.Decisions: Normalize headings by trimming and case-folding; check Scope labels only when the Scope heading exists; set report extension to .validation.md per acceptance.
